design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate aerial combat missions, destroy enemy formations, manage limited ammunition and fuel
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Resource scarcity (ammunition, fuel) balanced against wave-based enemy encounters
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Skilled fighter pilot commanding advanced aircraft through progressively complex aerial combat
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Emphasis on resource management and fuel/ammo scarcity as primary difficulty levers rather than pure bullet-dodging; player must balance offensive capability against survival range

difficulty.checkpointing: Mission-based checkpoint system; progression saved between campaign stages
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Limited; difficulty is inherent to mission design and enemy wave composition rather than selectable difficulty modes

progression.upgrade_system: Aircraft selection and loadout variation between missions
progression.unlock_mechanism: Sequential campaign progression through military campaign structure
replayability_hooks: Multiple aircraft with different handling characteristics
Alternate mission routes based on performance
Score/ranking system encouraging optimization of resource usage

world_building_techniques: Military campaign framing with named missions
Progression through defined theater of war

boss_design.philosophy: Encounter-based; boss encounters punctuate mission waves, requiring focused fire and evasion

faction_indicators: Allied air force identity through aircraft selection
Enemy formations representing opposing military faction
danger_signals: Dense enemy formations overwhelming defensive capability
environmental_storytelling: Aircraft damage states reflecting combat intensity
Fuel gauge and ammunition counter as persistent tension indicators
